visual_description: A blonde woman in a patterned top stands gesturing with both hands, facing slightly to her right. A woman with brown hair in a blue dress sits on a white couch, looking forward with her hands clasped. The background includes a wooden dresser with a TV on top and a purple wall.
audio_description: The audio features a female voice speaking in a neutral tone with moderate pitch and volume, accompanied by a sigh at the beginning.
